name: Pice Bach (Welsh Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, baking powder, and mixed spice into a bowl.
2. Rub in the margarine and lard until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs.
3. Gradually add the caster sugar, currants, and beaten eggs to the mixture.
4. Mix in milk to form a stiff dough.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (about 0.25 inches).
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds using a round cutter or knife.
7. Heat a hot griddle or frying pan.
8. Place the Welsh cakes on the hot surface and cook for about 4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
British Cookery (BTA/BFPC)
